description.ko: 첨단 기술의 삶과 비에 젖은 도시의 지하 세계가 만나 홀로그램 광고의 영원한 빛으로 밝혀진 미래 대도시의 숨막히는 전경입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic metropolis where high-tech living meets a rain-drenched urban underworld, illuminated by the eternal glow of holographic advertisements.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain reflecting vibrant neon signs in puddles, flying cars navigating between massive holographic billboards, towering skyscrapers with glowing blue and magenta lights, intricate futuristic architecture, hyper-realistic, 8k, volumetric lighting, synthwave aesthetic.
